summary: Meta-question: Will CP on Q40919 (shutdown before Feb 1, 2026) be above 33.30% on Jan 16? Current CP is exactly 33.30% as of Jan 3. Funding expires Jan 30. Key factors: 43-day shutdown just ended Nov 13, major partisan disagreements on appropriations, Democrats threatening shutdown over ACA subsidies, low trust between parties. Only 70 forecasters on the question.
content:
Key facts:
- Current CP: 33.30% as of Jan 3, 2026 (exactly at threshold)
- Check date: Jan 16, 2026 (11 days from Jan 5)
- Underlying: Will US gov shut down before Feb 1, 2026?
- Funding expires: January 30, 2026
- Previous 43-day shutdown ended Nov 13, 2025
- 70 forecasters on the question

Congressional situation:
- Senate: Defense bill passed, multiple others under negotiation, several await committee markup
- House: Only Defense and Energy-Water passed full chamber
- Major $21B gap between House and Senate defense versions
- Democrats hinting at willingness to shut down over ACA subsidies
- Low trust after previous shutdown
- 60 bipartisan Senate votes needed for final passage

Resolution edge cases:
- If shutdown happens before Jan 16: underlying resolves YES → meta resolves YES
- If full appropriations passed before Jan 16: underlying resolves NO → meta resolves NO
- Most likely: neither resolved, check CP on Jan 16
